sql_array: CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT, c INT, d TEXT, e FLOAT, f BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (42, 57, NULL, 'test', 3.14, TRUE), (3, 4, 5, 'example', 1.0, FALSE), (0, 0, 1, '', 2.718, NULL);
SELECT a, b, lcm(a, b) AS lcm_value FROM numbers WHERE lcm(a, b) IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(c, 0) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT d, COUNT(*) FROM numbers GROUP BY d HAVING SUM(COALESCE(e, 0)) > 2.5;
SELECT a, b, d FROM numbers WHERE [lcm(a, b)] && [3, 6] AND COALESCE(d, 'empty') != 'empty';
SELECT a, b FROM numbers WHERE b IS NOT NULL AND lcm(COALESCE(a, 1), b) = 6;
SELECT a, lcm(a, (SELECT MAX(b) FROM numbers WHERE b > 0)) AS max_lcm FROM numbers;
SELECT f, lcm(a, b) AS lcm_value FROM numbers WHERE f = TRUE AND lcm(b, NULLIF(a, 0)) > 20;
WITH cte AS (SELECT a, b, lcm(a, b) AS lcm_val FROM numbers) SELECT AVG(lcm_val) FROM cte WHERE lcm_val IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp AS SELECT a, lcm(a, b) AS lcm_val FROM numbers WHERE a > 0 AND b IS NOT NULL;
